title: Multi-Factor Authentication Enforcement
description: Multi-factor authentication is enforced for all privileged accounts and remote access sessions via Okta. Quarterly access reviews confirm no dormant accounts remain active beyond 90 days.

title: Pseudonymisation Gap in Marketing Pipeline
description: Email addresses and IP addresses are retained in plaintext in two staging tables for up to 72 hours before pseudonymisation is applied, violating the data minimisation principle under Article 32.
